text: Every morning, I wake up at 6 a.m. and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After that, I have a light breakfast and prepare for work. My work schedule begins at 8 a.m. and usually ends at 5 p.m. I take a short lunch break around noon. In the evening, I always exercise for about 30 minutes, either by jogging in the park or doing yoga at home. Then, I have dinner and spend time reading or watching a show before bed. This routine keeps me organized and healthy. Consistency is key for me.
